response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer, but the profile is a poor match for this embedded networking security role. The job requires native-level Japanese (not listed; candidate has English/Romanian fluency and basic German), strong C for UNIX development, Linux kernel investigation with source modification, and networking/security domain expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3, switch firmware). The candidate's core stack is web/backend (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) with only brief, dated C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and no demonstrated embedded firmware, kernel-level, or network-security work.
strengths: Long, broad software engineering career with TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship discipline
Some C/C++ exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI) and hardware-adjacent work (robotic arms)
Comfortable picking the right tool and learning across domains
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement is native-level)
No demonstrated Linux kernel modification, embedded firmware, or network-security experience
C/UNIX experience is minimal and dated; core expertise is web/backend
